name: gas-remote-debug
description: Raw CDP remote debugging for Google Apps Script web apps

scripts.check: node --check bin/gas-remote-debug.js && node --check src/cdp-client.js && node --check src/target-discovery.js && node --check src/context-prober.js && node --check src/safe-eval.js && node --check src/dom-helpers.js && node --check src/profiles/google-apps-script.js
